seo.title: VetFusion Animal Clinic SJDM | Veterinary Care in San Jose del Monte
seo.description: VetFusion Animal Clinic SJDM Branch provides veterinary checkups, diagnostics, surgery inquiries, pet care, vaccination inquiries, and urgent call support in San Jose del Monte.

clinic.name: VetFusion Animal Clinic
clinic.heroTitle: Complete veterinary care when your pet needs it most
clinic.heroLead: Routine checkups, diagnostics, surgery, preventive pet care, and urgent veterinary support for pets in San Jose del Monte.
clinic.trustText: Compassionate care, clear appointment guidance, and a convenient Gaya-Gaya location for local pet owners.
clinic.aboutText: VetFusion Animal Clinic supports pet owners in San Jose del Monte with practical veterinary guidance, clinic visits, appointment requests, and direct urgent-call support. Contact the clinic for the most current schedule and service availability.
clinic.address: VetFusion Animal Clinic, Gov. F. Halili St., Brgy. Gaya-Gaya, San Jose del Monte, Bulacan 3022

announcements.title: Call before urgent visits
announcements.shortDescription: For urgent concerns, call the clinic directly so the team can guide you before arrival.
announcements.fullDescription: For urgent concerns, please call 0966 085 1536 directly. Website messages and appointment requests may not be reviewed immediately, so direct calling is the clearest path for time-sensitive concerns.
announcements.imageAlt: Veterinary team using diagnostic equipment with a calm dog

announcements.title: Appointment requests need clinic confirmation
announcements.shortDescription: Online requests help the clinic review your preferred schedule but do not automatically confirm the visit.
announcements.fullDescription: Submit your preferred date, time, pet details, and concern through the appointment form. The clinic will contact you to confirm the final schedule and service availability.
announcements.imageAlt: Veterinarian checking an orange cat during a consultation

announcements.title: Ask about vaccination availability
announcements.shortDescription: Pet owners may contact the clinic to ask about current vaccine availability and appointment slots.
announcements.fullDescription: For vaccination inquiries, call or send an appointment request with your pet details. The clinic can guide you on availability and the next appointment step.
announcements.imageAlt: Veterinary team using diagnostic equipment with a calm dog

announcements.title: Pet care guidance inquiries
announcements.shortDescription: Contact the clinic for wellness guidance, preventive care, and recommended next steps for your pet.
announcements.fullDescription: For general pet care guidance, use the appointment form or contact the clinic directly with your pet's concern. The clinic can recommend the next appropriate consultation or care step.
announcements.imageAlt: Happy small dog in a clean veterinary clinic care area

announcements.title: Diagnostic consultation requests
announcements.shortDescription: For pets needing closer assessment, send a request or call the clinic for guidance.
announcements.fullDescription: If your pet may need laboratory work or diagnostic evaluation, contact VetFusion Animal Clinic with your pet's symptoms and preferred schedule. The clinic team can guide you on the next appropriate step.
announcements.imageAlt: Veterinary team using diagnostic equipment with a calm dog

services.title: Emergency Services
services.description: Immediate veterinary care for urgent and emergency cases. Our team is ready to provide prompt medical attention when your pet needs it most.

services.title: Routine Checkup & Consultation
services.description: Comprehensive health examinations, diagnosis, preventive care, and personalized treatment plans to help keep your pet healthy at every stage of life.

services.title: Anti-Rabies Vaccination
services.description: Protect your pet and your family with professionally administered anti-rabies vaccinations following recommended veterinary schedules.

services.title: Deworming
services.description: Routine deworming programs designed to prevent and treat internal parasites while supporting your pet's overall health.

services.title: Ultrasound
services.description: Advanced ultrasound imaging for pregnancy checks, internal examinations, and accurate diagnosis of various medical conditions.

services.title: Surgical Procedures
services.description: Safe and professional surgical procedures performed with proper patient monitoring and compassionate post-operative care.

reasons.title: Compassionate Pet Care
reasons.description: A calm clinic experience for owners who want clear guidance.

reasons.title: Clear Appointment Guidance
reasons.description: Requests are reviewed before the final schedule is confirmed.

reasons.title: Emergency Support
reasons.description: Urgent concerns are routed to direct phone contact.

reasons.title: Convenient Local Clinic
reasons.description: Located in Gaya-Gaya, San Jose del Monte, Bulacan.
